title: RELIEF NURSERY - 211info
text: HELEN'S PLACE RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers voluntary parenting support. The agency partners with parents by offering information about parenting and child development, a supportive professional who will listen and offer feedback, fun activities to do with your young child, therapeutic classrooms for children, connections with community resources, family nights and parent leadership opportunities. Access to food, diapers and clothing available for families enrolled in the program. 180 18th Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Families with minor children prenatal-age 5 Hours: Varies by service (503) 798-4744 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 798-4744 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Child Abuse Prevention Family Support Centers/Outreach Parent Support Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HELEN'S PLACE
